---
title: "ReDiLEEP"
description: "A funded MSCA Doctoral Network using response diversity knowledge to leverage efficient ecosystem preservation and restoration."
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
::: {.kicker}
MSCA Doctoral Network
:::

# ReDiLEEP

Using science-driven response diversity knowledge to leverage efficient ecosystem preservation and restoration.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Explore the network](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Doctoral opportunities](vacancies.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::
:::

{{< include _generated/index.md >}}

::: {.section}
::: {}
## Built Around Doctoral Researchers

The network will recruit doctoral candidates into linked projects hosted across the consortium. Each candidate will receive advanced disciplinary training, secondments, supervision across sectors, and a shared cohort experience.

[View planned vacancies](vacancies.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.callout-panel}
### Funding Note

ReDiLEEP stands for “Using science-driven Response Diversity knowledge to Leverage Efficient Ecosystem Preservation and restoration.” Add the confirmed grant agreement number and official EU acknowledgement wording when available.
:::
:::
